operator_authority.ffmpeg_role: required external media-processing dependency supervised by Rust
operator_authority.operator_wording: built fully in Rust with FFmpeg as dependency
operator_authority.external_runtime_boundary: Do not silently authorize additional production runtimes or native transport libraries; identify and prove any claimed necessity, especially JavaScript execution and browser impersonation, for explicit operator resolution.
operator_authority.required_direction: improve efficiency over yt-dlp while preserving and expanding the functionality stated in the design
operator_authority.scope_preservation: Do not narrow or discard the documented functionality expansion without an explicit operator decision.

forbidden_shortcuts: Treating the design's references as proof without opening current sources
Treating aspirational wording as a resolved contract
Recommending Python fallback in the production implementation
Recommending removal of FFmpeg from the architecture
Narrowing the documented functionality expansion merely to make implementation easier
Claiming implementation readiness while acceptance surfaces remain undefined
